Title: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system to Patrick LaFortune Jr.
Summary: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system constituting state route nine-W within the town of Bethlehem, at the town line bordering the city of Albany until its intersection with Moriah road, to Patrick LaFortune Jr.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law, in relation to dedicating a portion of the state highway system to Patrick LaFortune Jr.
